nodes.context: Corsican criminal organization; Francisci was an alleged member.
Corsican criminal organization; Francisci was recruited into it by Jo Renucci.
Powerful Corsican Mafia clan led by Antoine Guérini; rival of Francisci.

edges.evidence_quote: The second war occurred between 1965 and 1967 against the powerful Guérini clan. At that time, the Guérini clan was the ruling dynasty of the Corsican Mafia
edges.context: The Guérini clan was a ruling dynasty within the Corsican Mafia.

edges.evidence_quote: Marcel Francisci ... was a French politician and an alleged member of the Unione Corse ... he was recruited into the Corsican Mafia by Jo Renucci
edges.context: The Unione Corse and Corsican Mafia are both mentioned as criminal organizations Francisci was involved with, but no direct relationship between them is stated.
